attributes.title: Checkout Team Overview
attributes.visState:
{"type": "markdown", "params": {"markdown": "## Checkout Funnel — Product Team

**Space:** Product Team  |  **Owned by:** Checkout Engineering  |  **Source:** `teams/checkout/dashboards/`

---

### Live Investigation — open in Discover

Use the saved ES|QL queries to drill into checkout data:

| What to look for | Saved query |
|---|---|
| Failed checkouts (last 15 min) | **[UC1] Checkout errors — last 15 min** |
| Which service is slowest right now | **[UC1] Latency by service — p99** |
| Checkout spans over 100 ms | **[UC1] Slow checkout spans — root cause** |
| Error rate breakdown by service | **[UC1] Error rate by service** |
| Order events flowing through Kafka | **[UC1] Kafka order flow** |

> Open Discover, click the clock icon (Saved queries), and select any query above.

---

### SLOs — view in Observability > SLOs

| SLO | Target |
|---|---|
| Checkout Service — P99 Latency | 95 % of requests under 500 ms |
| Checkout Service — Error Rate | 99 % success rate |
| API Gateway — Availability | 99.9 % uptime |

---

### About this space

This dashboard was deployed by the checkout team using `./scripts/demo.sh provision-team`.

The **central platform team** defines this space, the data access policy, and the role that grants access.
The **checkout team** owns all content in this space — dashboards, saved queries, and extensions.

Neither team needs to touch the other's layer.
", "openLinksInNewTab": false}, "aggs": []}
